title: Glowing Tsukune with Japanese Pepper and Freekeh
description: A unique and flavorful dish combining the savory taste of tsukune with the spicy kick of Japanese pepper, all served atop a bed of nutty freekeh.
instructions: Cook the freekeh according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat 1 tsp of glowing seasoning over medium heat.
Add the tsukune and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Japanese pepper and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the tsukune and freekeh hot, garnished with soy sauce if desired.
Enjoy your glowing tsukune with Japanese pepper and freekeh!
